ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., ETH, BTC) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency (foreign key to cryptocurrencies table) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume_usd" REAL /* Trading volume in USD */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "percent_change_1h" REAL /* Percentage change in the last 1 hour */,
  "percent_change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in the last 24 hours */,
  "percent_change_7d" REAL /* Percentage change in the last 7 days */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (foreign key to users table) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency (foreign key to cryptocurrencies table) */,
  "opened_date" TEXT /* Date the account was opened */,
  "trading_fee" REAL /* Trading fee percentage */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Last transaction date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (foreign key to users table) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the watchlist is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_items" (
  "watchlist_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist item */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist (foreign key to watchlists table) */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency (foreign key to cryptocurrencies table) */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the item was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the watchlist item */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Alert price for the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (foreign key to users table) */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account (foreign key to accounts table) */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency (foreign key to cryptocurrencies table) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency at the time of trade */,
  "executed_date" TEXT /* Date and time the trade was executed */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees charged on the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., API, web, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (foreign key to users table) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., price alert, trade confirmation) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technical indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator (e.g., trend, momentum, volatility) */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Mathematical formula of the indicator */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the indicator calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "indicator_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator value */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technical indicator (foreign key to technical_indicators table) */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency (foreign key to cryptocurrencies table) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the value was calculated */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe for the indicator value (e.g., 15m, 1h, 1d) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator value (e.g., API, calculated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES technical_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency (foreign key to cryptocurrencies table) */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the model */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction was made */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Brief explanation of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)
